LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ONE RINCON HILL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT ORDER AND FOR ORDER RESTRAINING JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS GRANTED. PER THE ORAL ORDER AT THE NOVEMBER 29 HEARING, BECAUSE MR. EISNER FAILED TO FILE OPPOSITION PAPERS, THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOR REPORTED. (D302)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Order And For Order Restraining Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ONE RINCON HILL ASSOCIATION's Motion For Assignment Order And For Order Restraining Judgment Debtor is GRANTED. Per the oral order at the November 29 hearing, because Mr. Eisner failed to file opposition papers, the motion is granted in its entirety. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Nor Reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Order And For Order Restraining Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Continued To Jan-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN F. BAUMGARDNER OF THE CHAPMAN & INTRIERI, LLP, TEL. NO. 1-510-864-3600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
MISCHA EISNER, TEL. NO. 1-650-400-8924, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PLAINTIFF ONE RINCON HILL ASSOCIATION'S Motion For Assignment Order And For Order Restraining Judgment Debtor is continued to January 18, 2017 in order to give Mr. Eisner an opportunity to file an Opposition. Opposition needs to be filed by December 29, 2016 or else the motion will be granted. Reply to be filed by January 12, 2017. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk
